inputs.name: registeredAdapterList
inputs.description: Information for each adapter registered with the WmART package.

outputs.name: registeredAdapterList
outputs.description: Information for each adapter registered with the WmART package.

inputs.name: connectionAlias
inputs.description: Name of the connection node you want to disable.

inputs.name: connectionAlias
inputs.description: Name of the connection node you want to enable.

inputs.name: aliasName
inputs.description: Name of the connection node for which you want usage statistics returned.

inputs.name: adapterTypeName
inputs.description: The name of the adapter as registered with the WmART package.

outputs.name: connectionDataList
outputs.description: Information for each connection node registered with the specified adapter.

inputs.name: connectionAlias
inputs.description: Name of the connection node for which you want the connection state and error status returned.

outputs.name: hasError
outputs.description: Flag indicating if any error was detected on connection. The values are: true if an error was detected. false if no error was detected.

inputs.name: listenerName
inputs.description: Name of the listener you want to disable. The listener should have a state of enabled or suspended .

inputs.name: forceDisable
inputs.description: Optional. Flag to disable the listener regardless of whether it is still waiting for data from a back-end resource. The string may have one of these values: true to disable the listener. false to keep the listener enabled.

inputs.name: listenerName
inputs.description: Name of the listener you want to enable.

inputs.name: adapterTypeName
inputs.description: The name of the adapter as registered with the WmART package.

outputs.name: listenerDataList
outputs.description: Information for each listener registered with the specified adapter.

inputs.name: listenerName
inputs.description: Name of the listener for which you want the current state returned.

outputs.name: listenerState
outputs.description: Current state of the listener. The state will have one of these values: disabled if the listener is disabled. enabled if the listener is enabled. enablePending if the listener is in the process of starting. disablePending if the listener is in the process of disabling. suspended if the listener is suspended. suspendPending if the listener is in the process of suspending.

inputs.name: listenerName
inputs.description: The name of the suspended listener you want to resume. The service returns an error if you specify an invalid listener.

inputs.name: listenerName
inputs.description: Name of the listener for which you want to change the connection node.

inputs.name: connectionAlias
inputs.description: Name of the new connection node to use with the listener.

inputs.name: listenerName
inputs.description: The name of the listener you want to suspend. The service returns an error if you specify an invalid listener.

inputs.name: notificationName
inputs.description: The name of the listener notification you want to disable.

inputs.name: notificationName
inputs.description: The name of the polling notification you want to disable. The polling notification should have a state of enabled or suspended .

inputs.name: notificationName
inputs.description: The name of the notification for which you want to disable the publishing of events.

inputs.name: notificationName
inputs.description: The name of the listener notification you want to enable.

inputs.name: notificationName
inputs.description: Name of the polling notification you want to enable.

inputs.name: notificationName
inputs.description: The name of the notification for which you want to enable the publishing of events.

inputs.name: adapterTypeName
inputs.description: The name of the adapter as registered with the WmART package.

outputs.name: notificationDataList
outputs.description: Information for each listener notification registered with the specified adapter.

inputs.name: adapterTypeName
inputs.description: The name of the adapter as registered with the WmART package.

outputs.name: notificationDataList
outputs.description: Information for each polling notification registered with the specified adapter.

inputs.name: notificationName
inputs.description: The name of the listener notification for which you want the current state (enabled/disabled) returned.

outputs.name: notificationState
outputs.description: The current state (enabled/disabled) for the listener notification.

inputs.name: notificationName
inputs.description: The name of the polling notification for which you want the current state and schedule settings returned.

outputs.name: notificationState
outputs.description: The current state (enabled, disabled, pending disable, pending suspend, or suspended) for the polling notification.

outputs.name: scheduleSettings
outputs.description: Object that contains the notification's schedule settings as follows:

inputs.name: notificationName
inputs.description: The name of the polling notification you want to resume. The service returns an error if you specify an invalid polling notification.

inputs.name: notificationName
inputs.description: Name of the listener notification for which you want to change the listener.

inputs.name: listenerNode
inputs.description: Name of the new listener to use with the listener notification.

inputs.name: notificationName
inputs.description: Name of the polling notification for which you want to change the connection node.

inputs.name: connectionAlias
inputs.description: Name of the new connection node to use with the polling notification.

inputs.name: notificationName
inputs.description: The name of the polling notification you want to suspend. The service returns an error if you specify an invalid polling notification.

inputs.name: adapterTypeName
inputs.description: The name of the adapter as registered with the WmART package.

outputs.name: serviceDataList
outputs.description: Information for each adapter service registered with the specified adapter.

inputs.name: serviceName
inputs.description: Name of an existing adapter service for which you want to change the connection node.

inputs.name: connectionAlias
inputs.description: Name of the new connection node to use with the adapter service.

inputs.name: commitTransactionInput
inputs.description: Information for each commit request.

inputs.name: rollbackTransactionInput
inputs.description: Information for each rollback request.

inputs.name: timeoutSeconds
inputs.description: The number of seconds that the implicit or explicit transaction stays open before the transaction manager marks it for rollback.

inputs.name: startTransactionInput
inputs.description: Information for each start transaction request.

outputs.name: startTransactionOutput
outputs.description: Information for each start transaction request.
